name: Crazy Cake/Slp
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Sift together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Add the vegetable oil, vinegar, and vanilla. Pour in 2 cups of water; mix well. Spread the batter evenly in an ungreased 9-by-13-inch pan. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes.
